criteria.reason: tools/axxon_mcp_ptz.py point_move (lines 206-216) validates access_point is a TelemetryControl endpoint before any wire call (returns status=refused/bad-access-point otherwise), authenticates, builds PointMoveRequest(point=primitive.Point(x,y)) with int(session_id), and calls TelemetryService.PointMove. Unit tests test_point_move_ok and test_point_move_refuses_non_telemetry_endpoint confirm both paths.

tools/axxon_mcp_heatmap.py AxxonMcpHeatmap exposes build_heatmap, build_events_heatmap, build_floor_heatmap, execute_heatmap_query, execute_heatmap_query_typed. Follows module idiom (client_factory/config_factory/client/profile_name, heatmap_connect_axxon_profile + connect_axxon_profile, ensure_client, public_config_summary). Returns metadata only via _image_summary (result flag, heatmap_cells, image_bytes) and _consume_stream (responses, last_progress, heatmap_cells) capped at MAX_STREAM_RESPONSES=8. No raw image bytes returned; no write gate.

tools/axxon_mcp_media.py AxxonMcpMedia exposes request_connection, request_qos, request_tunnel, stream_probe. Module idiom present. Metadata only: cookie_present boolean (raw cookie never returned), transport name, proto/endpoint presence, sample-type tallies. stream_probe sends one MediaRequest capped at MAX_STREAM_SAMPLES=4. No write gate.

tools/axxon_mcp_server.py: create_server params heatmap/media (lines 74-75); conditional register_heatmap_tools/register_media_tools (lines 238-242); both register functions with @server.tool entries; --enable-heatmap/--enable-media CLI flags (lines 1992-1997); flag-gated instantiation (lines 2223-2232) passed to create_server (lines 2272-2273); ptz_point_move registered in register_ptz_tools (line 303). Fresh FakeServer smoke registered ptz_point_move, 6 heatmap tools, 5 media tools.

Judged against the designated sanitized evidence raw/live-verify.txt (live device unreachable from this stand, per instructions). It records each tested-pass method: Focus/Iris status ok on TelemetryControl.0, PointMove ok on TelemetryControl.2; BuildHeatmap/BuildEventsHeatmap/BuildFloorHeatmap result=True with image_bytes; ExecuteHeatmapQuery/ExecuteHeatmapQueryTyped yield 2 streamed responses with progress; RequestConnection cookie_present True; RequestQoS ok fps=5.0; RequestTunnel proto=tcp cookie_present True; Stream yields a config_update sample. All 9 walled methods are cited with their live error. Host sanitized to <demo-host>; secret scan clean. Note: live RPCs not independently re-run because the device is unreachable from this stand.
